
    A photorealistic, appetizing, and well-lit image of Oma's Gazpacho.
    Summary: Nathan,

Oma Dianne has some of the best recipes! When she decided to move from her home into assisted living she allowed me to have her recipe cards. I have not made all of them but I can almost guarantee they are the best. Just like you and your soon to be little brother. I love you dearly.

Mom


    Ingredients: 7  ripe tomatoes, 1.5 cups cold water with ice cubes, 0.4  onion, 0.5  green pepper, 0.5  cucumber, 1.5 cloves garlic, 0.4 cups olive oil, 0.4 cups sherry vinegar, 1.5 tablespoons salt, 1 teaspoon sugar
    Tags: undefined
